Set ratios above max_ratio to NA

Source: R/measures.R
clean_ratios.Rd

Single place for the rule that ratios above max_ratio cannot be interpreted and are treated as missing, used by summarise_measures() and explore_services().

Usage

clean_ratios(ratio, max_ratio = 1)

Arguments

ratio

Numeric vector of ratios

max_ratio

Numeric, ratios above this are set to NA. Default 1

Value

Numeric vector with ratios above max_ratio set to NA
